position_summary: Claude's revision fixes the main strategic error: the demo spine is now a deterministic, sub-second referee, with Claude Science preserved as an async/provenance lane rather than the synchronous core. The revised NAB2→MS NO is repo-real and much stronger than SLC1A5, but the plan still has a few implementation traps where stale wording or handoff instructions can reintroduce old risks.

findings.title: Preflight command still contradicts the required src-path import fix
findings.evidence: Verified from repo root: `python -c "import arbiter"` fails with `ModuleNotFoundError`. Verified the app-style fix works: inserting `Path.cwd() / 'src'` allows `from arbiter.lbd.referee_triple import ...` and the three live triples run correctly. The revised plan still says the preflight must include `python -c "import arbiter; ...referee_triple(...)"`, which will fail unless the command itself inserts `src` or the package is installed.
findings.concern_path: The builder implements the correct app startup `sys.path.insert`, then runs the written preflight command and gets a false failure, or worse, weakens the preflight to ignore import setup. This can waste time right before recording.
findings.suggested_action: Make the preflight command mirror the app exactly: `python -c "import sys; from pathlib import Path; sys.path.insert(0, str(Path.cwd()/'src')); from arbiter.lbd.referee_triple import ..."`, or add minimal packaging and test that instead.

findings.title: The static Claude Science artifact still contains the stale SLC1A5 disease-hop wording
findings.evidence: `docs/claude-science-evidence-chain_2026-07-08/claude_science_verdict.json` has `contrast_cases.SLC1A5.status = "REFUTED (at disease hop)"`. Round 1 established SLC1A5 is not the clean NO demo example, and the live referee output now confirms the clean NO is NAB2→multiple sclerosis: GATE/EFFECT/PROGRAM supported, DISEASE refuted, `answer=refuted_for_c`.
findings.concern_path: If the CS provenance panel renders contrast cases verbatim, the app can show the old SLC1A5 disease-hop framing right next to the newly corrected NAB2-MS story, making the demo look internally inconsistent.
findings.suggested_action: For the CS lane, either omit the SLC1A5 contrast case from the compact app view or label it as a legacy/chain-level contrast, while making NAB2→MS the only showcased clean disease-hop NO.

findings.title: The co-design brief still invites post-preflight scope back into the first build
findings.evidence: The sequencing section correctly says Tier 1 passes smoke before Tier 2/3, with sortable explorer, theme polish, motion, and live CS post-preflight. But the self-contained design brief still asks for three screens, light and dark themes, full sortable table, motion, and a visible fresh-CS button as if all are part of the design deliverable.
findings.concern_path: A downstream UI agent or solo builder follows the design brief rather than the sequencing constraints and spends deadline time on navigation, themes, explorer polish, or async-CS affordances before the three referee triples are screen-smoked.
findings.suggested_action: Split the brief into `Tier-1 mandatory design` and `post-preflight design notes`; remove light/dark themes, full explorer, and live-CS button from the first implementation handoff.

escalated_findings.rationale: Partially addressed but not fully. The app-level `sys.path.insert(.../src)` fix is correct and verified, but the revised written preflight still names a raw `python -c "import arbiter"` check that fails from repo root.

dropped_findings.rationale: Adequately addressed. Live check confirms NAB2→multiple sclerosis @ Stim8hr returns GATE supported, EFFECT supported, PROGRAM supported, DISEASE refuted, and `answer=refuted_for_c`; it is a genuinely clean disease-hop NO.
Adequately addressed. Claude preserved the async/precomputed CS lane and demoted live CS to disabled/operator-only stretch behind a wrapper, off the demo-critical path.
Adequately addressed at the sequencing level. Tier 1 is now the spine and must pass screen-only preflight before compact funnel/CS support sections or polish.
Adequately addressed. The plan now states downstream UNTESTED cards are presentation-only placeholders with no receipts, derived from HOP-0 halt state.
Adequately addressed. `app/fixtures/` with provenance is the right deliberate fixture path; `data/lbd_out/` can stay ignored.
Adequately addressed in principle. The CS lane is framed as provenance/narrative and preserves its own vocabulary instead of being coerced into referee verdict taxonomy.
Adequately addressed. The live sweep JSON matches the revised breakdown: 21,995 refuted_for_c, 1 refuted_effect, 10 weak, 3 flagged, 30 clean supported.

recommended_next_question: Round 3 should settle the exact Tier-1-first implementation handoff: the corrected preflight command, whether the compact demo includes any funnel seconds, and how the CS panel avoids surfacing the stale SLC1A5 contrast while preserving the async deep-dive lane.
